message:
🐛 Add close/back button to Settings page header (#2625)

Add an X button to both the desktop sidebar header and mobile header
on the Settings page so users can easily navigate back without relying
on the main navigation.

- Uses navigate(-1) when browser history exists, falls back to '/'
- Appears in both desktop and mobile layouts
- Consistent with standard close button patterns

Fixes #2600

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
